positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical cosmic creature—a fox-like celestial guide with glowing neon blue and purple accents, surrounded by swirling constellations and geometric abstract nebulae. The fox is in a dynamic, standing pose, leaping over crystalline, glowing mountain ridges. Use strong, saturated contrast and clean, thick line art combined with gradient washes, reminiscent of vaporwave aesthetics meets mystical folklore. The composition must be perfectly centered for maximum print impact, with the main subject filling approximately 60% of the frame. Lighting should be dramatic, coming from the celestial body itself, creating hard shadows and glowing highlights. Color palette: deep indigo, cyan, electric magenta, and gold accents. Suitable for direct-to-garment printing, high detail, vector-like clarity.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, dirty, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, disfigured, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, bad composition, cartoon, realistic, photo
